title: Wayward Attributes
description: Wayward Attributes is a primarily visual mod that overhauls how attributes are shown in tooltips.
body:
Wayward Attributes is a primarily visual mod that overhauls how attributes are shown in tooltips.

\- Attributes are given icons through a data-driven system

\- Swords have their sweeping damage properties exposed as Attributes

\- Bows and Crossbows now have all of their properties exposed as Attributes

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_604f9516-a570-4409-8e5a-431cfc936266.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f1a14c5e-264d-4201-9670-210f4f3d31d3.png)

 

Config update coming soon
